---
title: "Roadmap"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Analysis Roadmap

Map from setup to model specification, execution, diagnostics, and extraction/prediction.

[Start here](start-here.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Basic compile and run](basic-model-compile-run.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[Reference hub](../reference.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

## Levels
1. Usage diagrams (wrapper/parameter/predict choices)
- [Full package usage diagrams](usage-diagrams.qmd)

2. Theory background (GPD tails + DPM bulk + causal estimands)
- [Advanced theory background](../advanced/theory/index.qmd)

3. Setup and first run
- [Start here](start-here.qmd)

4. Model assembly and execution
- [Basic model compile and run](basic-model-compile-run.qmd)

5. Backend choice and workflow ordering
- [Backends and workflow](backends-and-workflow.qmd)

6. Diagnose and stabilize
- [Troubleshooting](troubleshooting.qmd)

7. Extract, predict, and compare
- [Examples hub](../examples/index.qmd)

## Quarto vs pkgdown split

- Quarto: curated routes and workflow context.
- pkgdown: exact function interfaces and package reference.

- [pkgdown reference](../pkgdown/reference/index.html)

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Start Here](start-here.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
